data.title: HBAR Teeters at the Edge – Will It Break Free or Break Down?
data.description:
HBAR is currently balancing precariously at a critical juncture, raising the question of whether it will manage to break free from its current constraints and soar to new heights, or if it will succumb to downward pressure and experience a significant decline in value.
source: https://blocknews.com/hbar-teeters-at-the-edge-will-it-break-free-or-break-down/

data.title: Stablecoins are becoming ‘default settlement layer’ for internet: Alchemy
data.description:
Stablecoins are now the “default settlement layer for the internet,” surpassing Visa and Mastercard in onchain transaction volume.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/stablecoins-default-settlement-layer-internet-alchemy?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Alchemy: Stablecoins are becoming the “default settlement layer” of the internet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Noam Hurwitz, head of engineering at Alchemy, said that stablecoins have become the mainstay of Internet payments, and their adoption rate has now exceeded that of major traditional card networks. The adoption rate of stablecoins has "exploded" and is becoming the default settlement layer of the Internet. Companies such as PayPal and Stripe are integrating stablecoins to leverage on-chain infrastructure for faster and cheaper transactions. Stablecoins make currency "cheap, fast, global and secure to transfer." These features make them popular for a variety of purposes and are widely adopted in cross-border payments and prediction markets such as Polymarket. (Cointelegraph)

source: https://blocknews.com/bonk-bounces-back-but-is-it-just-a-flicker-or-the-start-of-a-fire/

data.title: Binance Alpha to Airdrop 5,550 Fuel Network (FUEL) Tokens
data.description: Binance Alpha has officially listed Fuel Network (FUEL). Eligible users can claim an airdrop of 5,550 FUEL tokens on the Alpha Events page within 24 hours after trading begins by using Binance Alpha Points.The airdrop will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis. Users with at least 170 Binance Alpha Points are eligible to participate until the airdrop pool is fully claimed or the event ends.Claiming the airdrop consumes 15 Binance Alpha Points, and users must confirm their claim on the Alpha Events page within 24 hours; otherwise, it will be considered a forfeiture of the airdrop.Additionally, Binance Alpha has announced a FUEL trading competition with a prize pool of 99,000,000 FUEL tokens.

data.title: OpenAI reaches custom AI collaboration agreements with the U.S. Department of Defense, the Indian government, and Grab
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OpenAI has reached customized artificial intelligence cooperation agreements with the US Department of Defense, the Indian government and Grab. OpenAI charges at least 10 million US dollars for its artificial intelligence customization and consulting services. (The Information)

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches Fuel Network Trading Competition
data.description: According to the announcement from Binance on X, the platform is set to launch the Fuel Network Trading Competition on Binance Alpha. This event invites users to trade FUEL tokens using their Binance Wallet (Keyless) or via Binance Alpha, offering exclusive token rewards during the promotion period. The competition runs from 2025-06-29 13:00 (UTC) to 2025-07-13 13:00 (UTC). Participants will be ranked based on their total purchase volume of FUEL tokens during this period, with the top 9,000 users sharing 99,000,000 FUEL tokens equally, amounting to 11,000 FUEL per user. Only trades executed through Binance Wallet (Keyless) or Binance Alpha qualify for this promotion, excluding third-party dApp transactions. The competition focuses solely on cumulative purchases, excluding selling activities. There are no volume caps for participants, and transactions related to token bridging are not eligible. Trading volume from Binance Alpha-to-Alpha token pairs will not count towards Binance Alpha Points or affect competition rankings. To participate, users must update their Binance App to the latest version, create and back up a Binance Wallet (Keyless), and trade FUEL during the promotion period. Rankings will be calculated automatically after the promotion ends, with rewards distributed to eligible winners' Binance Alpha accounts by 2025-07-27 16:00:00 (UTC). Participants must adhere to the Activity Terms, which include Binance's Terms and Conditions for Prize Promotions, Terms of Use, and Privacy Policy. Only users from qualified regions who complete account verification (KYC) and hold an active Binance Wallet are eligible. Binance reserves the right to disqualify users involved in dishonest behavior or tampering with program code. The platform may amend the Activity Terms without prior notice, including changes to eligibility criteria, winner selection, and activity duration. Users are advised to review the Binance Wallet Terms of Use and conduct their own research before participating.

data.title: OpenAI Secures AI Customization Deals with Global Entities
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI has entered into agreements with the U.S. Department of Defense, the Indian government, and Grab for customized artificial intelligence solutions. These collaborations involve OpenAI providing tailored AI services and consultancy, with fees starting at a minimum of $10 million.

data.title: Spanish Coffee Chain Vanadi Coffee Expands Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to Odaily, Spanish coffee chain Vanadi Coffee has announced an increase in its Bitcoin holdings by acquiring an additional 20 BTC, bringing its total to 54 BTC. The company's shareholders have approved a strategic shift aimed at positioning Vanadi Coffee as Spain's largest publicly traded Bitcoin company. As part of this strategy, the company plans to invest up to 1 billion euros in Bitcoin acquisitions.

The move follows the company’s establishment of its American unit in Miami last month as part of an aggressive international growth plan. Metaplanet said the […]

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches Fuel Network (FUEL), Users with at least 170 Binance Alpha Points Can Participate in the Airdrop
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Alpha is now online on Fuel Network (FUEL).
Eligible Binance users can use Binance Alpha points to claim 5,550 FUEL tokens airdrop on the Alpha event page within 24 hours after the start of trading.
Users with at least 170 Binance Alpha points can participate in the airdrop on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is full or the event ends.
Please note that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha points. Users must confirm the claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page, otherwise it will be deemed to have given up the airdrop.

data.title: Over 25% of South Koreans in their 20s–50s now invest in digital assets
data.description:
Over 25% of South Koreans aged 20 to 50 now hold digital assets, with crypto accounting for 14% of their overall financial portfolios, according to a new report by the Hana Institute of Finance. According to the report, 31% of crypto ownership is held by investors in their 40s, 28% in their 30s, and 25% […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-koreans-invest-in-digital-assets/
